global.description: The ad features a light gray background with a central product outline and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a discount on a product with a call to action.

elements.label: light gray background
elements.description: A light gray background fills the entire canvas, providing a neutral base for the ad.

elements.label: product outline
elements.description: An outline of a product, possibly a phone or device, is centered in the ad, suggesting a focus on the item.

elements.label: circular shapes
elements.description: Two circular shapes are positioned below the product outline, adding a decorative touch to the design.

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: The logo 'ZenDrop' is displayed at the top, featuring a modern font that conveys a contemporary brand image.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small 'SALE' badge is positioned at the top right, using bold typography to attract attention.

elements.label: discount offer
elements.description: The text 'Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25' is prominently displayed in a large, bold font, emphasizing the promotional offer.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Shop now' is located at the bottom, designed to encourage immediate action.

elements.label: price tag
elements.description: The price '€9.99' is displayed in a clear, bold font at the bottom, indicating the cost of the product.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with bold typography, discount offer, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the product outline is centered, the headline is below the product, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25, ZenDrop, Shop now, €9.99, SALE
